rationale: In the citing paper, Ho and Chong (2003) appears only as part of a grouped citation with Fader and Hardie (1996) to support a general point that SKU-level demand modeling can matter when attributes vary across SKUs. The citing paper does not build its demand or supply specification on Ho and Chong's framework, nor does it reuse its estimation approach or test its specific claims. The reference functions as background positioning rather than a paper-specific conceptual or methodological pillar.
